channel.title: My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content on My New Hugo Site

item.description: Object.assign 기본함수 HTML : id(#) > class(.) > 태그 영상 배속 속도를 올리는 자바스크립트 코드 ![[assets/Pasted image 20231206154746.png]] ![[assets/Pasted image 20231206154955.png]] ![[assets/Pasted image 20231206160931.png]] ![[assets/Pasted image 20231207144910.png]]![[assets/Pasted image 20231207144922.png]] ![[assets/Pasted image 20231207144950.png]]
